query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_position = 'main' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as main_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_position = 'secondary' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as secondary_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_position = 'aplus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aplus_count
FROM kb_images;
